ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size category (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., Italy, Germany, UK, US) */,
  "market_description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the market is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the market is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold for the size in the respective market */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total sales for the size in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_distribution_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_distribution_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category sold */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the sale occurred */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where feedback was collected */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the size in the respective market */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the size in the market */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the size in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category covered by the promotion */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the promotion is applied */,
  "discount_percent" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the trend is observed */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., Growth, Decline) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (percentage or units) */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend observation */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the trend is observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., Admin, Manager, Analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., Size Distribution, Sales Trend) */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Promotion, Update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response to feedback */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback being responded to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was provided */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_responses_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES customer_feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_distribution_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical distribution record */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original distribution record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold for the size in the respective market */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total sales for the size in the market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_distribution_history_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_distribution_history_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES size_distribution ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_distribution_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market where the segment is applied */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the market segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_segments_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_sizes" (
  "segment_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment-size association */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market segment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_sizes_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES market_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_id")
)
